name: NSFW school RP
description:
My own take on a NSFW highschool RP with anypov in mind.

The setting takes place in the heart of Tokyo, Japan. In Seibu highschool, the FIRST Japanese school to relax it’s dress code to allow students to wear casual clothes if they’d like. And where the teachers wear a bit less… (you’ll find out what I mean quickly.)

Seibu high was originally an all-girls highschool, but switched to co-ed two years ago. Even though it switched to co-ed, the ratio of male students are still low with a staggering 90% female student population.

Make friends, seduce teachers, attend classes like as a boring student. Hell… do whatever you feel like doing I don’t care it’s your story to make, I don’t judge. So feel free to share your experiences if you’d like.

.

.

.

This is my first bot based on other school RP’s written from the ground up, let me know if something needs to be changed in the comments. It’s only been tested on JLLM, and I’m currently still tweaking it.

Hey I’m in the process for creating a lorebook for this bot, to create defined teachers for the classes, key students for the roleplay, and various locations in the school. If anyone wants to share some ideas for it, share them in the comments and I might add them in the roleplay.

All characters are 18+
creator: LazyFox90
